review_text: I bought Laptop A and Phone X. Laptop A battery is terrible.
Phone X performance is slow but camera is good.
Laptop A overheats after 30 minutes of use.
Tablet Z screen resolution is amazing and very sharp.
issue_summary: Screen resolution is amazing and very sharp

review_text: Laptop A keyboard stopped working within a week.
issue_summary: Keyboard stopped working within a week

review_text: Phone X battery drains too fast and heats up.
issue_summary: Battery drains too fast and heats up

review_text: Tablet Z is lightweight and easy to carry.
Laptop A performance is extremely slow while gaming.
issue_summary: Performance is extremely slow while gaming

review_text: Phone X camera quality is excellent but battery life is poor.
Laptop A makes loud fan noise and gets very hot.

issue_summary: Charging port is loose and unreliable

review_text: Phone X screen flickers occasionally.
